name: Aguaro
description: Aguaro offers SaaS solutions integrated with ServiceNow to help companies automate the management of their environmental impact and reduce their carbon footprint. It streamlines hardware inventory retrieval and presents the data through intuitive dashboards.

name: Antarctica
description: Antarctica is a real time observability platform for monitoring the carbon emissions of your on-premise and cloud infrastructure, IT hardware assets and websites. It can also provide optimization recommendations.

name: BoaviztAPI
description: An open source API that provides environmental impact data for IT equipment, including carbon footprint, energy consumption, and resource depletion.

name: Carbon-Intensity UK
description: An API service from UK National Grid ESO that provides carbon intensity data for the UK electricity grid.

name: CarbonDB
description: CarbonDB collects and consolidates energy usage data from multiple sources within a company, providing a unified view of energy consumption. It accurately converts energy usage into carbon emissions, enabling precise tracking of a company's carbon footprint.

name: Climatiq
description: A proprietary API that provides carbon emissions data for various activities, including cloud computing, to help organizations measure and reduce their carbon footprint.

name: Electricity Maps
description: An API that provides real-time and forecast carbon intensity data for electricity grids around the world.

name: Energy-Charts
description: A service that provides data on electricity generation, consumption, and carbon intensity for various countries in Europe.

name: fruggr
description: fruggr is a platform for collecting, managing and optimizing the environmental footprint of your cloud & on-prem infrastructure, digital workplaces, IT assets, websites, applications and more.

name: Resilio Tech
description: Resilio Tech is a solution for assessing the environmental footprint of your digital products and services, whether it is an information system, website, or satellite.

name: ResilioDB
description: ResilioDB breaks down the electronic components of a device like RAM or CPU, in order to assess the environmental impacts of any possible configuration.

name: Sopht
description: Sopht is a platform for collecting, managing and optimizing the environmental footprint of your cloud & on-prem infrastructure, digital workplaces, IT assets, websites, applications and more.

name: Technology Carbon Estimator
description: The Technology Carbon Estimator is designed to give a high-level overview of the possible areas of carbon impact within your IT estate. The estimations are framed within the "Technology Carbon Standard", a model proposed by Scott Logic, designed to help you map out, measure and improve the environmental impacts of your technology.

name: Verdikt
description: Verdikt is a platform for assessing your sustainable IT maturity and track its performance.

name: WattTime
description: An API that provides real-time and forecast marginal carbon intensity data for electricity grids around the world.
